nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=85 beats='{HERO} and {COMPANION} arrive at {PLACE} on a bright morning at {OPENING_MOMENT}, {COMPANION} in {HAT} carrying {PICNIC} and {HERO} swinging {TOOL}; the sea has gone way out and left the rocks shiny and dotted with tide pools; {COMPANION} says the water always comes back, like a friend coming home; {HERO} cannot wait to explore {THRESHOLD}; warm, sunny, and excited, never worried'>>

choices.label: Follow {COMPANION} down the sandy path.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{COMPANION} leads the way down the sandy path and spreads {TOWEL} on {ENTRANCE} where she can see everything; she reminds {HERO} of the beach rules, stay on the dry rocks, wet feet are fine, and call if you ever want a hand; {HERO} promises with a salute and turns toward the shining pools'>>

choices.label: Step out onto the flat low-tide rocks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='out on the rocks {HERO} hears tiny voices; {OPENING_MOMENT} has left some tide-pool friends stranded too high and dry, a {Q1_SPECIES} {Q1_PLIGHT}, a {Q2_SPECIES} {Q2_PLIGHT}, a {Q3_SPECIES} {Q3_PLIGHT}, and a {Q4_SPECIES} {Q4_PLIGHT}; far off {DEADLINE_SIGN}; {HERO} decides to help everyone before {DEADLINE}, starting with the {Q1_SPECIES}'>>

choices.label: Hurry to the {Q1_SPECIES} on the high ledge.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='{HERO} reaches the tall rock where {Q1_NAME} the {Q1_SPECIES} sits {Q1_PLIGHT} above his head; her five arms droop like a tired star sticker; she calls down that the ledge is getting warm and she would very much like to be back in {Q1_HOME} below'>>

choices.label: Climb the low steps for a closer look.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{HERO} climbs two safe flat steps and says hello; {Q1_NAME} perks up one arm to wave; the ledge is dry as toast and {Q1_HOME} waits just below; {Q1_NAME} says any rescue plan is fine with her, she is a very patient {Q1_SPECIES}; {HERO} looks at {TOOL}, at his own two hands, and at the little slope'>>

choices.label: Think up a rescue plan for {Q1_NAME}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='{HERO} lines up his ideas while {Q1_NAME} waves cheerfully from her dry ledge; he could {Q1_ATTEMPT1}, {Q1_ATTEMPT2} to pour her a waterfall, or {Q1_METHOD} himself; {COMPANION} watches from {ENTRANCE}, ready with a tip whenever he wants one; must read the same on a first visit and on any try-again visit'>>

choices.label: Toss water up with your cupped hands.
Carry {TOOL} up the little slope.
Wet your hands and gently slide {Q1_NAME} down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='{HERO} scoops sea water in his cupped hands and tosses it up toward the ledge, but the water rains straight back down on his own head, plip plop; {Q1_NAME} giggles so hard her arms wiggle; {HERO} laughs and shakes his wet hair like a puppy; no harm done, just a soggy fringe; he can line the plans up again or trot over and ask {COMPANION} for a tip'>>

choices.label: Line up the plans and try again.
Ask {COMPANION} for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='{HERO} fills {TOOL} and starts up the little slope, but it wobbles, tips, and whooshes every drop over his own shoes; his toes squelch; {Q1_NAME} claps two arms for the amazing splash; {HERO} grins and wiggles his soggy toes; nothing lost, {TIDE} has plenty more water; he can go back to his plans or ask {COMPANION} for a tip'>>

choices.label: Shake off the splash and try again.
Ask {COMPANION} for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=65 beats='{COMPANION} tips back {HAT} and smiles; {Q1_SPECIES}s like slow and gentle, she says, wet your hands first so {Q1_NAME} can hold on comfy, then slide her down to {Q1_HOME} like a little slide ride; {HERO} can try the gentle sliding idea right away or look over his plans once more; reads the same on any visit'>>

choices.label: Try {COMPANION}'s gentle sliding idea.
Look over the plans once more.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{HERO} dips his hands in the pool until they are cool and wet, reaches up, and {Q1_NAME} holds on with all five arms; slow and gentle, he carries her down the rock into {Q1_HOME} with a soft ploop; {Q1_NAME} stretches every arm wide, like a happy dance underwater'>>

choices.label: Watch {Q1_NAME} settle into her pool.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=60 beats='{Q1_NAME} presses one arm up against the glassy top of the water like a high five and burbles thank you; just then {Q2_SIGN} comes from a puddle across the rocks; someone else needs help; {HERO} can hurry toward the sound, or sit with {COMPANION} and let {TIDE} finish the rescuing'>>

choices.label: Hurry toward the flappy splashing sound.
Sit with Gran and let the tide finish the rescuing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='{HERO} hops carefully from flat rock to flat rock toward the splashing; out past the pools {TIDE} has crept one sparkly step closer, glittering as it comes; {COMPANION} waves {HAT} from {ENTRANCE}; the splashing gets louder in a puddle no bigger than a dinner plate'>>

choices.label: Kneel beside the shrinking puddle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='in the little puddle a small silver {Q2_SPECIES} zips in busy circles; the puddle is only as deep as a soup bowl and the warm sun is sipping it smaller; he pops his mouth up and says his name is {Q2_NAME} and he would very much like a bigger pool please; hopeful and chatty, never scared'>>

choices.label: Lean in and say hello to the little {Q2_SPECIES}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{HERO} tells {Q2_NAME} that help is here; {Q2_HOME} waits just two hops away, calm and shady; {Q2_NAME} zooms an excited lap around his puddle; {HERO} looks from his two quick hands to the strip of sand between the puddles to {TOOL}, three ways this rescue might go'>>

choices.label: Think up a plan to move {Q2_NAME}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='{HERO} studies the puddle while {Q2_NAME} swims hopeful loops; he could {Q2_ATTEMPT1}, {Q2_ATTEMPT2} so the puddle can flow to {Q2_HOME}, or {Q2_METHOD}; {Q2_NAME} blows a bubble that seems to say you can do it; must read the same on a first visit and on any try-again visit'>>

choices.label: Catch {Q2_NAME} with your bare hands.
Dig a little river over to {Q2_HOME}.
Scoop water and {Q2_NAME} up together in {TOOL}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='{HERO} cups his hands and reaches in, but {Q2_NAME} is quicker than a sneeze; he zips between {HERO}'s fingers, tickles his thumb, and splashes a tiny wave right up {HERO}'s nose; {HERO} snorts with laughter and {Q2_NAME} does a proud little flip; no harm done to anyone; {HERO} can pick a plan again or ask {COMPANION} for a tip'>>

choices.label: Line up the plans and try again.
Ask {COMPANION} for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='{HERO} drags his finger through the sand to dig a little river, but the thirsty sand drinks the water down with a polite glug before it travels anywhere; the channel just sits there, damp and empty; {HERO} pats the sand and giggles at his disappearing river; {Q2_NAME} shrugs his fins; {HERO} can pick a plan again or ask {COMPANION} for a tip'>>

choices.label: Smooth the sand and try again.
Ask {COMPANION} for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=65 beats='{COMPANION} leans forward on {ENTRANCE} and smiles; {Q2_SPECIES}s do not like to be squeezed, she says, but they do love to swim; {Q2_METHOD} and he can ride to {Q2_HOME} swimming the whole way; {HERO} can try the gentle scoop or look over his plans once more; reads the same on any visit'>>

choices.label: Scoop water and {Q2_NAME} up together, {COMPANION}'s way.
Look over the plans once more.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{HERO} lowers {TOOL} slowly into the puddle and {Q2_NAME} swims right in, riding his very own cupful of sea; two careful hops later {HERO} tips {TOOL} at the edge of {Q2_HOME} and {Q2_NAME} pours out with the water, zooming one giant loop around his cool new home'>>

choices.label: Watch {Q2_NAME} zoom around his big new pool.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='{Q2_NAME} leaps one sparkling thank-you hop and races another lap; from over by the seaweed patch comes {Q3_SIGN}, like tiny castanets; someone else is stuck; {HERO} waves goodbye to {Q2_NAME} and turns toward the sound'>>

choices.label: Follow the clack-clack sound to the seaweed.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='{HERO} crosses the rocks toward the clacking; behind him {TIDE} has slid another sparkly step up the sand, filling the farthest pools first like little cups; the seaweed patch ahead is green and shiny, and something in the middle of it is waving'>>

choices.label: Cross the rocks to the seaweed patch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='in the seaweed patch a small {Q3_SPECIES} is {Q3_PLIGHT} like a present that tied itself; he clacks his claws hello and says his name is {Q3_NAME}; he was climbing through when the seaweed flopped over, and now his legs are in a friendly muddle; cheerful, not frightened'>>

choices.label: Crouch down beside the tangled {Q3_SPECIES}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{HERO} crouches close and {Q3_NAME} wiggles to show which legs are stuck; the seaweed is shiny and slippery as wet noodles; {Q3_NAME} promises his claws only pinch things that poke too fast; {HERO} looks at the tangle, then at the picnic spoon peeking out of his pocket, and starts to think'>>

choices.label: Think up a plan to untangle {Q3_NAME}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='{HERO} considers the seaweed muddle while {Q3_NAME} waits, waving one free claw like a tiny flag; {HERO} could {Q3_ATTEMPT1}, {Q3_ATTEMPT2}, or {Q3_METHOD}; {COMPANION} hums a beach tune from {ENTRANCE} nearby; must read the same on a first visit and on any try-again visit'>>

choices.label: Give the seaweed one quick tug.
Hold out the picnic spoon for {Q3_NAME} to grab.
Untangle one seaweed ribbon at a time.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='{HERO} grips the slippery seaweed and gives one quick tug; the wet ribbon slides straight through his fingers and {HERO} sits down plop in a shallow warm puddle; {Q3_NAME} waves both claws as if to say whoa, nice splash; {HERO} laughs and stands up dripping and completely fine; the tangle is still tangled; he can pick a plan again or ask {COMPANION} for a tip'>>

choices.label: Stand up and try again.
Ask {COMPANION} for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='{HERO} holds out the picnic spoon and {Q3_NAME} grabs it, but instead of climbing free the {Q3_SPECIES} pinches on tight and waves the spoon around like a shiny trophy; {HERO} has a gentle giggly tug-of-war just to get his spoon back and tucks it safely in his pocket; the tangle is still tangled; he can pick a plan again or ask {COMPANION} for a tip'>>

choices.label: Pocket the spoon and try again.
Ask {COMPANION} for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=65 beats='{COMPANION} calls over softly from {ENTRANCE}; tangles hate hurrying, she says, hum a slow song and {Q3_METHOD}, and the whole knot will give up all by itself; {HERO} can try the slow ribbon-by-ribbon way or look over his plans once more; reads the same on any visit'>>

choices.label: Untangle one ribbon at a time, {COMPANION}'s way.
Look over the plans once more.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{HERO} hums a slow beach song and loosens one green ribbon, then another, then another; the tangle gives up with a soft slurp and {Q3_NAME} steps out, stretching each leg one by one like a tiny gym class; {Q3_HOME} is deep and ready for him'>>

choices.label: Watch {Q3_NAME} scuttle into the cool pool.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=60 beats='{Q3_NAME} clacks a happy drumroll on a pebble and scuttles a thank-you circle around his pool; high on the dry rock above, {Q4_SIGN}, a {Q4_SPECIES} shell a long way from any water; {HERO} can head up to help, or watch from {COMPANION}'s {TOWEL} while {TIDE} fetches the little {Q4_SPECIES} itself'>>

choices.label: Head for the tiny shell far up the rock.
Watch from {COMPANION}'s {TOWEL} while {TIDE} fetches the {Q4_SPECIES}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='{HERO} tiptoes up the dry rock, keeping his feet on the rough gray parts the way {COMPANION} likes; {TIDE} is closer now, filling pool after pool behind him with happy gurgles; near the top, a shell no bigger than a button sits all alone in the sunshine'>>

choices.label: Tiptoe up the dry rock to the tiny shell.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='near the top of the dry rock sits a {Q4_SPECIES} shell no bigger than a button, far from any water; a tiny voice inside gives a tiny polite cough; the sun is warm, the rock is very dry, and the shell is a very long walk from home for someone so small'>>

choices.label: Bend down and greet the little {Q4_SPECIES}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{HERO} bends down and the tiny shell peeks out; her name is {Q4_NAME}, and she went exploring at {OPENING_MOMENT} and wandered much too far; {Q4_HOME} is way down the rock, and {Q4_SPECIES}s are the slowest walkers on the whole beach; {HERO} dips one hand in a nearby pool while he thinks'>>

choices.label: Think up a plan to bring {Q4_NAME} home.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='{HERO} thinks it over while {Q4_NAME} waits, snug in her shell; he could {Q4_ATTEMPT1}, {Q4_ATTEMPT2}, or {Q4_METHOD}; {Q4_NAME} says any way is fine, she is in no hurry at all, though {TIDE} rather is; must read the same on a first visit and on any try-again visit'>>

choices.label: Roll {Q4_NAME} along like a tiny wheel.
Cheer for {Q4_NAME} to walk faster.
Offer {Q4_NAME} a ride on your wet palm.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='{HERO} gives {Q4_NAME} the gentlest nudge to start her rolling like a tiny wheel, but {Q4_NAME} tucks herself snugly into her shell and simply will not budge, stuck fast as a pebble glued to the rock; no rolling today, thank you, says a tiny muffled voice; {HERO} laughs at his silly fizzled idea, and {Q4_NAME} peeks back out, completely comfy; he can pick a plan again or ask {COMPANION} for a tip'>>

choices.label: Smile at the stubborn shell and try again.
Ask {COMPANION} for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='{HERO} claps and cheers, go {Q4_NAME} go; {Q4_NAME} tries her very fastest, and after one whole minute of mighty effort she has traveled the width of a single pebble; she puffs proudly; at this speed they might arrive by next Tuesday; {HERO} cheers once more anyway, because trying deserves a cheer; he can pick a plan again or ask {COMPANION} for a tip'>>

choices.label: Line up the plans and try again.
Ask {COMPANION} for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=65 beats='{COMPANION} cups her hands around her mouth and calls up gently; little {Q4_SPECIES}s ride better than they roll, she says, wet your palm so it feels like home, let {Q4_NAME} hold on tight, and walk her down slow as a Sunday; {HERO} can offer the wet-palm ride or look over his plans once more; reads the same on any visit'>>

choices.label: Offer {Q4_NAME} a wet-palm ride, {COMPANION}'s way.
Look over the plans once more.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{HERO} wets his palm in a pool and lays his hand flat beside {Q4_NAME}; she slides aboard and holds on snug; this is the longest, highest, most careful rescue of the whole day, step by slow step down the big rock while {TIDE} gurgles behind him like a cheering crowd, until he kneels at the edge of {Q4_HOME}'>>

choices.label: Lower {Q4_NAME} into her cool pool.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='{Q4_NAME} settles onto her favorite green stone with a tiny happy squeak, home at last; just then a bright gurgle runs all along the rocks; {TIDE} is arriving, filling the pools like a friend opening every door on the street; {HERO} lifts his head'>>

choices.label: Look up at the sparkling line of {TIDE}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='{HERO} stands tall on the flat rocks; every friend is safe, {Q1_NAME} stretched out in her pool, {Q2_NAME} zooming in the deep one, {Q3_NAME} drumming by the seaweed, {Q4_NAME} snug on her green stone; {TIDE} sweeps closer in sparkly stripes, warm and friendly, coming to welcome everyone home; {COMPANION} gives {HERO} a proud thumbs up from {ENTRANCE}'>>

choices.label: Watch the first wave-finger slide in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the first thin finger of {TIDE} slides across the rocks and fills the nearest pool right up to its brim; the water is home and the whole rescue is complete; the pools fizz and sparkle like a celebration; {HERO} can follow {TIDE} from pool to pool to see each friend greet it, climb up beside {COMPANION} on {ENTRANCE} to watch it all at once, or open {PICNIC} to celebrate the rescue team'>>

choices.label: Follow {TIDE} from pool to pool.
Climb up beside {COMPANION} on {ENTRANCE}.
Open {PICNIC} to celebrate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='{HERO} trots beside {TIDE} as it fills pool after pool like a row of tea cups; {Q1_NAME}'s pool is next and already trembling at the brim; {HERO} can stay and cheer as {Q1_NAME}'s pool spills over, race the soft foam line up the dry sand just for fun, or peek around for anyone else who might still need a hand'>>

choices.label: Cheer as {Q1_NAME}'s pool spills over.
Race the foam line up the dry sand.
Peek around for anyone else who needs help.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='{HERO} lines up his toes on the dry sand, well ahead of the water, and waits for the soft foam line to catch up; {COMPANION} calls ready, steady, go from {ENTRANCE}; {TIDE} whooshes gently forward and {HERO} takes off giggling along the dry sand beside it'>>

choices.label: Run the last few splashy-sounding steps.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='{HERO} shades his eyes and looks over the busy, filling pools; nobody calls for help, but under a shadowy ledge something small is bobbing on the new water, and along the wet sand a glittery trail winds toward a heap of shining pebbles; both look like tiny mysteries worth one last look before {PICNIC}'>>

choices.label: Peek under the shadowy ledge.
Follow the glittery trail.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='{HERO} climbs up beside {COMPANION} on {ENTRANCE} and she wraps him in the warm corner of {TOWEL}; below them {TIDE} fills every pool one by one while the friends wave, splash, and clack; {COMPANION} asks how the rescue team would like to celebrate; they could sing a welcome-home song, shout three hip-hip-hoorays, or call each friend by name as their pool fills'>>

choices.label: Sing the welcome-home song.
Shout three hip-hip-hoorays.
Call each friend's name as their pool fills.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='{COMPANION} opens {PICNIC} on {ENTRANCE}, crackers, berries, and two little cups of juice; below them {TIDE} sparkles into the last pools while the friends splash hello to it; {HERO} can raise juice cups in a toast to the rescue team, tell {COMPANION} the whole story of the rescue day, or start planning the next {OPENING_MOMENT} rescue patrol'>>

choices.label: Raise juice cups to the rescue team.
Tell {COMPANION} the whole rescue story.
Plan the next {OPENING_MOMENT} rescue patrol.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=80 beats='{HERO} snuggles next to {COMPANION} on {TOWEL} and shares crackers while {TIDE} slides in; the water reaches {Q2_NAME} and his puddle grows into a lake, unwraps {Q3_NAME} from his seaweed, and carries {Q4_NAME} gently home, doing the rest of the rescuing all by itself; {HERO} waves to each friend as they float free and happy; one rescue by {HERO} and three by {TIDE}, says {COMPANION}, what a fine team; {HERO} snuggles deeper into the warm towel, proud of {Q1_NAME}'s rescue and already excited to come back and visit the brimming pools'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=80 beats='from {COMPANION}'s {TOWEL} {HERO} watches sparkly {TIDE} climb the rock, higher and higher, until it reaches tiny {Q4_NAME}'s shell and lifts her like a leaf on a stream; the little {Q4_SPECIES} sails down to her pool in style, and a tiny faraway wheee floats across the rocks; three rescues by {HERO} and one by {TIDE}, says {COMPANION}, sounds like a fine team; {HERO} waves until the little shell settles safely into deep cool water'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='{TIDE} tips over the rim of {Q1_NAME}'s pool and the water rises around her like a big cool hug; {Q1_NAME} does a slow magnificent underwater cartwheel of thank you, all five arms sparkling; {HERO} cheers, {COMPANION} cheers from {ENTRANCE}, and {TIDE} keeps rolling gently in, welcoming every rescued friend home; best {OPENING_MOMENT} ever, {HERO} decides, and {Q1_NAME} cartwheels once more as if she completely agrees'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='{HERO} and the foam line race up the beach and {HERO} wins by exactly one giggling toe; {TIDE} pit-pats little wave-claps behind him and fills the last pools while {COMPANION} shouts hooray; {HERO} takes a big bow to {TIDE}, and it seems to bow back with one soft sparkly wave; every friend is home, the water is back where it belongs, and {HERO} is the fastest rescuer on the whole {PLACE}'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='under the shadowy ledge bobs {BONUS1_FIND}, already floating home on the new water and needing no rescue at all; he tips his shell to {HERO} exactly the way {COMPANION} tips {HAT}; {HERO} tips an invisible hat right back; a new friend to wave to as {TIDE} carries him past the rocks, while all the rescued friends settle happily into their brimming pools'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='the glittery trail winds between two pebbles and stops at {BONUS2_FIND}, polished smooth by {TIDE}; {COMPANION} says it is a thank-you gift from {PLACE} for a hard-working rescuer; {HERO} holds it to his ear and hears {TIDE} inside, whooshing home; he carries it back in {TOOL}, a treasure to remember the rescue day forever'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='{HERO} and {COMPANION} make up a welcome-home song right there on {ENTRANCE}, with a happy sound for {Q1_NAME}, for {Q2_NAME}, for {Q3_NAME}, and for {Q4_NAME}; the friends join in from their brimming pools, splashing along in time, and {TIDE} keeps the beat with soft whooshes; the song floats out over the water until every pool is full and everybody is home'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='hip hip hooray, hip hip hooray, hip hip hooray; {HERO} and {COMPANION} shout three big cheers as {TIDE} rolls home across the rocks, and the friends answer with splashes, bubbles, and claw-clacks from their pools; {TIDE} fills the very last pool with a happy gulp; every friend is safe, every pool is brimming, and the whole {PLACE} feels like it is clapping along'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='as each pool fills, {HERO} calls its friend by name; welcome home, {Q1_NAME}; welcome home, {Q2_NAME}; welcome home, {Q3_NAME}; welcome home, {Q4_NAME}; each friend pops up and waves an arm or a fin or a claw or a tiny shell, then settles snug into deep cool water; {COMPANION} squeezes {HERO}'s shoulder; every single friend is home, and {HERO} is the reason why'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='{HERO} and {COMPANION} clink their little juice cups together on {ENTRANCE}; to the rescue team, says {COMPANION}, to {Q1_NAME}, {Q2_NAME}, {Q3_NAME}, and {Q4_NAME}, and to the helper who never gave up; below them {TIDE} sparkles into every pool while the friends splash a fizzy toast of their own; {HERO} sips his juice and decides that rescue days taste especially sweet'>>

ending.title: A Toast to the Rescue Team

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='{HERO} tells {COMPANION} the whole story of the rescue day, being {Q1_PLIGHT}, {Q2_PLIGHT}, {Q3_PLIGHT}, and the long slow ride home for the littlest shell; {COMPANION} listens under {HAT} and declares it the best {PLACE} story she has ever heard; below them the full pools sparkle and the friends splash, as if adding their own favorite parts to the tale'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='{HERO} and {COMPANION} plan the next {OPENING_MOMENT} rescue patrol with cracker-crumb maps on {TOWEL}; {COMPANION} will bring {HAT} and {PICNIC}, {HERO} will bring {TOOL} and his gentle wet hands; below them {TIDE} tucks every friend into deep cool water for the afternoon; {TIDE} will go out again someday, {COMPANION} says, and when it does, the rescue patrol will be ready'>>
